summary: Iteration 94: Admin Product Editor with new fields, Mira Memories fix, and Celebrate Products - All features tested and working. 10/10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified.

celebrate_admin_products.details: Admin Celebrate tab shows 319 products with proper stats display

add_product_modal_new_fields.details: Add Product modal displays all new fields: Bases (comma-separated), Fresh Delivery Cities, Life Stage dropdown, Occasion dropdown, Dietary dropdown

edit_product_options.details: Edit Product modal populates existing product data including Shopify options

save_product_api_new_fields.details: POST /api/celebrate/admin/products accepts and saves new fields (bases, fresh_delivery_cities, life_stage, occasion, dietary)

update_product_api_new_fields.details: PUT /api/celebrate/admin/products/{id} updates products with new fields correctly

mira_memories_unauthenticated.details: Shows 'Sign in to see Mira's Memories' prompt instead of infinite loading for unauthenticated users

mira_memories_authenticated.details: Shows memories grouped by type (Events & Milestones, Health & Medical, Shopping & Preferences, Life Context) for authenticated users

mira_memory_api.details: /api/mira/memory/pet/{pet_id} returns 401 for unauthenticated, 200 with grouped memories for authenticated

mira_ai_cake_queries.details: Mira AI responds to cake queries with relevant information about birthday cakes and celebrate options

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed products for testing new fields (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 94 verified: 1) Admin Celebrate Products tab shows 319+ products with new fields (bases, fresh_delivery_cities, life_stage, occasion, dietary), 2) Mira Memories on Pet Profile fixed - shows 'Sign in' prompt for unauthenticated users instead of infinite loading, shows grouped memories for authenticated users, 3) Mira AI responds to cake queries. All backend APIs working correctly.

admin_celebrate_products.details: Shows 319 products with stats (Products, Bundles, Partners, Pending, Completed)

add_product_modal.details: New fields visible: Bases, Fresh Delivery Cities, Life Stage, Occasion, Dietary dropdowns

edit_product_modal.details: Populates existing product data including Shopify options

product_api_new_fields.details: Create and Update APIs accept and persist new fields

mira_memories_unauthenticated.details: Shows 'Sign in to see Mira's Memories' with Sign In button

mira_memories_authenticated.details: Shows memories grouped by type: Events & Milestones, Health & Medical, Shopping & Preferences, Life Context

mira_ai_cakes.details: Responds to cake queries with relevant celebrate pillar information
